title: Redesign Button.jsx — flat rectangles, uppercase JetBrains Mono labels, red accent primary
acceptance_criteria: All rounded-full removed, border-radius: 0 on all button elements
Labels set to uppercase with JetBrains Mono via font-family in style
Secondary variant: solid 1px border (--color-hairline), transparent bg, white text
Outline variant: 1px solid border white/40, transparent bg
Ghost variant: no bg, muted text, hover shows solid bg
Destructive variant: solid red bg (can keep #dc2626)
ButtonIcon: no rounded-full, no translate on group-hover, static
base className: remove rounded-full, remove shadow transitions
